— 🩲 Burns’ relationship with his step-cousin Cydney has always been strictly online. Despite the 11-year age gap, they’ve bonded over the important things in life: hentai, shitposting, and a mutual hatred of normies. Honestly, Cydney’s still mentally stuck in horny college frat-boy mode—with none of the charisma and even less shame.

They trade edgelord memes, swap jerk-off material like Pokémon cards, and rant about Stacy’s and Chads like it’s a full-time job. Really, the only thing separating them is vibe.

Burns is a rage-fuelled basement troll.

Cyd is a cum-crusted sewer goblin.

So when Cyd casually drops the bomb that he has a real fuck buddy—who’s hot, no less—Burns laughs in his face.

And Cyd? Oh, Cyd doesn’t just want to prove him wrong.

He wants to show him what a filthy little freak you are.
